content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Apr 9, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development focused on foundational framework improvements, specifically introducing a new `agent` workspace to streamline repository startup and updating core runtime-composition APIs to support flexible character loading.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Agent Workspace and Repository Bootstrapping**
* Introduced a new `agent` workspace to simplify the repository startup process ([#6702](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6702)).
* Added multi-language support structures within the agent workspace, including Python and Rust configurations ([#6702](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6702)).

**Runtime Composition and API Updates**
* Refactored core runtime-composition APIs to allow `loadCharacters` to accept file paths and configuration options ([#6702](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6702)).
* Updated workspace dependencies and scripts to support the new modular architecture ([#6702](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6702)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
* [#6712](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6712): feat(core): group addressee routing and anti-loop prompt guidance.

## CLOSED ISSUES
* None.

## NEW ISSUES
* None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
* None.
